arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Manchester City in the Premier League this evening. Ange Postecoglou’s side are targeting a fourth consecutive Premier League win, following a mini-renaissance in North London. arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou ‘pushing’ for Tottenham player’s renewal – Meeting scheduled with entourage in ‘coming weeks’
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are working on extending Rodrigo Bentancur’s contract, according to TuttoMercatoWeb. The Uruguay international has been a regular under Ange Postecoglou when available for selection. Despite being suspended for domestic fixtures for his remarks against Son Heung-min, he made 28 appearances in all competitions for Tottenham this season. arts.sum: Manchester City captain Kevin De Bruyne is out of contract at the end of the season and could leave the club on a free transfer, with manager Pep Guardiola speaking out about his future

arts.ttl: 12 players could miss Tottenham vs Man City as Pep Guardiola makes final Erling Haaland decision
arts.sum: Erling Haaland did not play for Manchester City against Liverpool or Real Madrid because of a knee injury, but Pep Guardiola hopes to have the striker back for the Tottenham Hotspur match
